AWARD-WINNING EXCELLENCE

Recognised as Kenya's best vehicle lighting installer — twice in 2024.

🥇 Beba Awards 2024
Winner — Best Lighthouse Installer. Certificate of Excellence presented to VIN TECH by FEDCO Kenya, powered by Payless Africa.
🥈 Ma3 Gala Awards 2024
2nd Place — Lighthouse Installer Of The Year 2024, presented to Vintech Lighting on 8th December 2024 by the MA3 TV Show.
What We Do

OUR SPECIALITIES

We blend electrical engineering with pure artistry to create breathtaking vehicle transformations. Every build is a masterpiece — custom, bold, and built to turn heads.

01
🐍
Snake Slashes & Custom Patterns
Signature intricate snake slash lighting patterns meticulously routed along body panels. Our most iconic aesthetic — precision LED work that defines the VintechLights style.
02
🌟
Underglow & Chassis Lighting
Full underglow LED systems that make your vehicle float in a sea of color. Multi-zone, colour-selectable, and synced to music for maximum street presence day and night.
03
🎨
Aesthetic Illumination & Interior Design
Where electrical engineering meets artistry. We design immersive lit interiors — neon floor lighting, ambient strip arrays, UV effects, and glowing matatu cabin transformations.
04
🚌
Full Matatu Lighting Rigs
Complete exterior and interior matatu lighting packages — from rooftop LED crowns and door lighting to full-body neon wraps. We build matatus that own the road at night.
05
📡
Car Tracker & Alarm Systems
Professional GPS tracker and alarm installation. Real-time vehicle monitoring, remote immobilisation, and high-security alarm systems for total peace of mind.
06
⚡
Electrical Wiring & Horn/Fyam
Expert vehicle electrical wiring, fault diagnosis, and custom horn installations — air horns, musical horns, pararira, and fyam. Your sound, your signature.
Our Portfolio

RECENT WORK

Book Your Ride
Who We Are

VINCENT OTIENO

VintechLights is Kenya's premier custom automotive lighting studio, founded and led by Vincent Otieno. We don't just install lights — we engineer glowing experiences that transform vehicles into rolling works of art.

From the iconic matatu culture of Nairobi's streets to private car owners who want that one-of-a-kind edge, we bring unmatched creativity, technical mastery, and an obsession for detail to every single build.

Recognised as Kenya's best — winning the 2024 Beba Awards for Best Lighthouse Installer and 2nd Place at the prestigious Ma3 Gala Awards.
